## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and workflow updates.](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content delivery on track despite technical issues; 9 new articles and 7 refreshes scheduled for this week](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [Overall performance increased for the second straight week, with blog pages performing best](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Image generation workflow nearly complete; to be rolled out for new articles and select refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Comparison pages to be updated: big table removed, keeping only "at a glance" summary](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Updates

  - [Refreshes: 2 delivered last week, 7 scheduled this week](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [New content: 5 articles delivered last week, 9 scheduled this week (including comparison pages)](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Delays due to technical issues (flooding) affecting Usman's work](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Comparison pages: 4 older samples staged, 3 new pages this week](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [Image generation workflow nearly complete, expected next week](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Medium distribution and publishing automation tested; minor bugs identified:](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
      - [Medium articles saving in unexpected folders](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
      - [Social meta descriptions exceeding character limits](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Bulk update of meta titles for integration pages possible; team to provide list of pages](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Overall performance increased for second straight week](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Top performing pages: all from the blog](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Non-branded impressions slightly down (likely seasonal)](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)
  - [Conversion events increased slightly week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
      - [Demo clicks increased most](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
      - [Pricing link clicks saw slight dip](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Monthly performance at similar levels to previous month](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Cohort performance:](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
      - [Ecosystem tutorials and features saw higher traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
      - [Click performance mostly positive](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
      - [Average position mixed; room for improvement (e.g., ecosystem at position 16)](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)

### LLM Traffic

  - [New high in LLM traffic, mainly from Perplexity referrals](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [ChatGPT referrals steady](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Citations low (4% vs competitors' 20%); team investigating](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)

### Comparison Pages Update

  - [Decision to remove large comparison table](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [Keep only "at a glance" summary table](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [Implementation: wait until all pages are updated with rich text before removing table](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)

### Image Generation Workflow

  - [To be implemented for new articles initially](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
  - [For refreshes:](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
      - [Applied to GrowthX-created content](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
      - [Not applicable to pages with only summary updates](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)

### Meta Descriptions Update

  - [Proposal to update meta descriptions in bulk for Strapi blog](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [Team to investigate feasibility of bulk image generation](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to stage comparison pages and notify Strapi team for frontend updates](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [Strapi to provide list of integration pages for meta title updates](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Implement image generation workflow for new articles once ready](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
  - [Investigate bulk update process for meta descriptions and images on existing content](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and improving citation performance in LLM results](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Proceed with current refresh approach; revisit full updates for top 10 performing technical articles when time allows](https://fathom.video/share/Q2zny6w2tLRyoe_YcBQe4B-tLTh-S7dE?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
